message:
I've been thinking about how much easier it is to prep when you have a solid checklist to work from—no second-guessing what you actually need. Found this straightforward breakdown of emergency kit essentials that's genuinely helpful (and not overwhelming). The nice thing about having basics ready is that it takes the pressure off if something unexpected happens.

What's one item you already keep on hand that you're pretty sure has saved you time or stress before?
